summary: InterFitAI Elite Coaching Engine Reset — Iteration 15. Tested all 10 scenarios from the engine philosophy reset using a mix of pure Python (build_blueprint() direct) and API-level tests. 50/50 tests passed (100%). Tests validated: session purity, set inflation guard, min-set floor, arms focus routing, full-body split rationale, time-cap compliance, strength rest floors, beginner bias, session_native gate, and API smoke test.
critical_code_review_comments: FOCUS_AREA_PATTERNS['full_body'] = [] correctly reverted — prevents any per-session injection, relies on split selection for full-body distribution. VERIFIED.
session_native gate (line 2173/2303) correctly blocks cross-session injections. Push sessions can't get lower compounds; lower sessions can't get upper pull compounds. VERIFIED.
primary_boosted flag (line 2277) ensures only ONE primary compound gets +1 set per session. Multiple compound boosts are correctly suppressed. VERIFIED.
Secondary injection (line 2300-2321) only injects patterns that appear in session_native — arms secondary correctly routes tricep_push to push sessions and bicep_curl to pull sessions only. VERIFIED.
Post-loop final validation (line 2423-2430) only does min-set floor (< 2 → 2), no cross-session injection. VERIFIED.
MIN_SETS_FLOOR dict (line 2258) filters sub-floor slots before focus boost. conditioning finishers correctly exempt from the 2-set floor. VERIFIED.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing test user cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b
context_for_next_testing_agent: Elite Coaching Engine Reset fully verified with 50 tests. Key invariants confirmed: (1) FOCUS_AREA_PATTERNS['full_body']=[] — no per-session injection for full_body focus; (2) session_native gate prevents cross-contamination of upper/lower patterns; (3) primary_boosted=False flag limits primary boost to ONE compound per session; (4) secondary injection only into session-native patterns; (5) post-loop only does min-set floor enforcement; (6) relabeler is safety net only, not firing under normal operation. The test file /app/backend/tests/test_engine_reset_v15.py is ready for regression testing in future iterations.

test_results.session_purity_full_body_arms_5day: PASSED — Upper-Push has ZERO lower compounds, Lower-Quad has ZERO upper pull compounds, arms secondary correctly routes tricep to push / bicep to pull
test_results.session_purity_legs_glutes_4day: PASSED — upper_lower split selected, lower sessions lower-only, upper sessions upper-only
test_results.no_set_inflation: PASSED — max sets across all configurations = 5 (≤ 6 limit), primary boost capped at 5
test_results.min_set_floor: PASSED — no non-conditioning exercise below 2 sets in any configuration
test_results.arms_focus_routing: PASSED — push_pull_legs split, tricep_push in push days, bicep_curl in pull days
test_results.full_body_rationale: PASSED — split_rationale present and explains upper/lower coverage + frequency
test_results.time_cap_45min: PASSED — accessory/isolation ≤ 3 sets, primary ≤ 4 sets, total within budget
test_results.beginner_bias: PASSED — Machine Chest Press first (not Barbell Bench Press) for beginner full_gym
test_results.api_smoke_test: PASSED — 200 OK, all exercises have sets ≥ 2, positive rest_seconds, gif_url field present, exercise_type field present
